title: polygala major subsp. baetica
intro: Polygala major subsp. baetica, a subspecies of the Polygala major plant, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygala major subsp. baetica include its potential to improve respiratory health, reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
